task_completion.description: Thunderbird Address Book is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird Address Book window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The master contact has the correct First Name, Last Name, and Display Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the contact details pane or edit window, First Name is 'Robert', Last Name is 'Chen', and Display Name is 'Robert Chen'.

task_completion.description: The master contact has the correct Primary and Secondary Email addresses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the contact details pane or edit window, Primary Email is 'robert.chen@apexfinancial.com' and Secondary Email is 'rchen99@gmail.com'.

task_completion.description: The master contact has the correct Organization and Work Phone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the contact details pane or edit window, Organization is 'Apex Financial' and Work Phone is '555-0198'.

task_completion.description: All duplicate or obsolete entries for Robert/Bob Chen have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the address book contact list pane, there is exactly one entry for 'Robert Chen'. No other duplicate or outdated entries for him (e.g., 'Bob Chen' or duplicate 'Robert Chen' rows) are visible in the list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Thunderbird GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard Mozilla Thunderbird interface, not a text editor, script, or mock UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the address book database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or script executions modifying Thunderbird profile files.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contact details are displayed within Thunderbird's actual contact card or edit dialog, not in a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected master contact details are: First Name: 'Robert', Last Name: 'Chen', Display Name: 'Robert Chen', Primary Email: 'robert.chen@apexfinancial.com', Secondary Email: 'rchen99@gmail.com', Organization: 'Apex Financial', Work Phone: '555-0198'. All other variations of Robert/Bob Chen must be deleted, leaving exactly one record.
